# vLLM Auto-Tuner & 3D Dashboard

Tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng tГ¬m cбәҘu hГ¬nh vLLM tб»‘i Ж°u trГӘn server 8Г— H100 80GB вҖ” khГҙng cбә§n tinh chб»үnh thб»§ cГҙng.

---

## Kiбәҝn trГәc tб»•ng quan

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  HOST (Conda/Python)                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  FastAPI :9100  в”Җв”ҖREST/WSв”Җв”Җв–ә  React Dashboard          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ                         (Plotly 3D scatter)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в–ј                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Orchestrator                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җв”Җ scanner.py    (quГ©t /projects/.../models)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җв”Җ heuristic.py  (tГӯnh VRAM budget)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җв”Җ docker_worker.py  (spin-up/kill container)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җв”Җ benchmark.py  (Д‘o throughput, TTFT, latency)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җ db.py         (SQLite lЖ°u kбәҝt quбәЈ)                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                    в”Ӯ docker run --gpus "device=X,Y"
                    в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  WORKER (Docker vllm/vllm-openai)                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  vLLM OpenAI-compatible server :8000                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Isolated GPU access                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - VRAM 100% released khi container stop                в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

## CбәҘu trГәc thЖ° mб»Ҙc

```
vllm-autotuner/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ backend/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.py           # FastAPI app: REST + WebSocket + static serve
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ models.py         # Pydantic schemas
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ scanner.py        # QuГ©t /projects/MedTrivita/common/models/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ heuristic.py      # Math engine: VRAM, KV cache, sweep configs
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ docker_worker.py  # Docker container lifecycle
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ log_parser.py     # Regex phГўn loбәЎi lб»—i tб»« Docker logs
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ benchmark.py      # Дҗo throughput / TTFT / latency
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ db.py             # SQLite (aiosqlite) persistence
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ exporter.py       # XuбәҘt Excel (.xlsx)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ frontend/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ public/index.html
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ src/
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ App.jsx                         # Layout chГӯnh
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ api.js                          # REST + WebSocket client
в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ components/
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ ModelSelector.jsx           # Dropdown model + info badge
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ GPUSelector.jsx             # Grid checkbox GPU + VRAM bar
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ ConfigPanel.jsx             # Form cбәҘu hГ¬nh + VRAM estimator
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ Dashboard3D.jsx             # Plotly scatter3d + heatmap 2D
в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җ DetailPopup.jsx             # Modal chi tiбәҝt khi click Д‘iб»ғm
в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ results.db                          # SQLite (tб»ұ tбәЎo khi chбәЎy)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ setup_and_run.sh                        # Script setup + build lбә§n Д‘бә§u
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
```

---

## YГӘu cбә§u

| ThГ nh phбә§n | PhiГӘn bбәЈn |
|-----------|----------|
| Python (conda env `data`) | 3.10.19 |
| Docker | вүҘ 24 |
| Node.js | 18.x |
| GPU | NVIDIA H100 80GB (hoбә·c tЖ°ЖЎng Д‘Ж°ЖЎng) |

**Python packages** (Д‘ГЈ cГі sбәөn trong env `data`):

```
fastapi, uvicorn, docker, openpyxl, httpx, websockets, aiosqlite
```

**Docker image**:

```
vllm/vllm-openai:v0.18.1   (hoбә·c nightly)
```

---

## CГ i Д‘бә·t & ChбәЎy

### File cбәҘu hГ¬nh hбәЎ tбә§ng (YAML)

ToГ n bб»ҷ Д‘Ж°б»қng dбә«n/port/image Д‘ГЈ Д‘Ж°б»Јc tГЎch ra file:

```bash
config.yaml
```

CГЎc key quan trб»Қng:
- `paths.models_dir`
- `paths.db_path`
- `docker.default_image`
- `docker.port_start`, `docker.port_end`
- `api.host`, `api.port`

BбәЎn cГі thб»ғ override bбәұng biбәҝn mГҙi trЖ°б»қng `AUTOTUNER_*` nбәҝu cбә§n.

### BЖ°б»ӣc 1 вҖ” Setup lбә§n Д‘бә§u

```bash
cd /home/data_team/usr/huynq/MLops/vllm-autotuner
bash setup_and_run.sh
```

Script nГ y sбәҪ:
1. CГ i `aiosqlite` nбәҝu chЖ°a cГі
2. CГ i `pyyaml` Д‘б»ғ Д‘б»Қc cбәҘu hГ¬nh YAML
3. `npm install` + `npm run build` React frontend
4. Khб»ҹi tбәЎo SQLite database

### BЖ°б»ӣc 2 вҖ” ChбәЎy Backend (dГ№ng tmux Д‘б»ғ trГЎnh rб»ӣt SSH)

```bash
tmux new-session -s autotuner

conda activate data
cd /home/data_team/usr/huynq/MLops/vllm-autotuner/backend
python main.py
```

> **LЖ°u ГҪ**: PhбәЈi dГ№ng `--workers 1` vГ¬ hб»Ү thб»‘ng dГ№ng in-process state (port allocator, GPU locks, WebSocket manager).

Detach khб»Ҹi tmux: `Ctrl+B` rб»“i `D`  
Attach lбәЎi: `tmux attach -t autotuner`

### BЖ°б»ӣc 3 вҖ” SSH Port Forwarding (trГӘn mГЎy cГЎ nhГўn)

```bash
ssh -L <api_port>:localhost:<api_port> <username>@<server-ip>
```

Mб»ҹ trГ¬nh duyб»Үt: **http://localhost:<api_port>**

---

## HЖ°б»ӣng dбә«n sб»ӯ dб»Ҙng

### 1. Chб»Қn Model

Dropdown tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng quГ©t thЖ° mб»Ҙc cбәҘu hГ¬nh tбәЎi `paths.models_dir` trong `config.yaml` vГ  hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ:
- Tб»•ng params (total / active cho MoE)
- Precision badge (FP8, BF16, GPTQ-W4...)
- Dung lЖ°б»Јng disk
- Architecture

### 2. Chб»Қn GPUs

Grid checkbox 8 GPU vб»ӣi VRAM usage real-time (refresh mб»—i 10 giГўy).  
GPU Д‘ang bбәӯn sбәҪ hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ badge **BUSY**.

### 3. Dб»ұ tГӯnh VRAM (tГ№y chб»Қn nhЖ°ng khuyбәҝn khГӯch)

NhбәҘn **"Dб»ұ tГӯnh VRAM"** Д‘б»ғ xem breakdown trЖ°б»ӣc khi chбәЎy:

```
VRAM_usable = 80 GB Г— gpu_memory_utilization
VRAM_free   = VRAM_usable - VRAM_weights - 7 GB overhead
max_kv_tokens = VRAM_free / (2 Г— head_dim Г— num_kv_heads/TP Г— 2B Г— num_layers)
max_num_seqs  = max_kv_tokens / 2048 (avg seq len)
```

VГӯ dб»Ҙ вҖ” Qwen3.5-122B-FP8, TP=4, 4 GPU, util=0.90:
```
Weights = 122B Г— 1 byte / 4 = 30.5 GB/GPU
Usable  = 80 Г— 0.90 = 72 GB
Free    = 72 - 30.5 - 7 = 34.5 GB  вҶ’ max_num_seqs вүҲ 256
```

### 4. BбәҜt Д‘бә§u Sweep

NhбәҘn **"BбәҜt Д‘бә§u Sweep"** вҖ” hб»Ү thб»‘ng tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng:
1. Sinh danh sГЎch cбәҘu hГ¬nh (TP sizes Г— max_num_seqs Г— gpu_mem_util)
2. Lб»Қc bб»Ҹ configs khГҙng khбәЈ thi theo heuristic
3. Tuбә§n tб»ұ spin-up Docker container cho tб»«ng config
4. Дҗo benchmark (throughput, TTFT, P50/P99 latency)
5. Dб»«ng container (VRAM freed) вҶ’ chбәЎy config tiбәҝp theo
6. Stream kбәҝt quбәЈ real-time qua WebSocket

### 5. PhГўn tГӯch 3D Chart

| Trб»Ҙc | Гқ nghД©a |
|------|---------|
| X | `max_num_seqs` |
| Y | `tensor_parallel_size` |
| Z | Metric Д‘ГЈ chб»Қn (throughput / TTFT / latency) |

- **Xoay 3D**: kГ©o chuб»ҷt trб»ұc tiбәҝp trГӘn chart
- **Projection XY/XZ/YZ**: click button Д‘б»ғ xoay vб»Ғ gГіc 2D + hiб»Үn heatmap
- **Click Д‘iб»ғm**: mб»ҹ popup chi tiбәҝt (config, VRAM breakdown, metrics, error log)
- **Дҗб»•i Z-axis**: dropdown chuyб»ғn giб»Ҝa throughput / TTFT / P99

### 6. XuбәҘt Excel

Button **"XuбәҘt Excel"** trГӘn header hoбә·c trong popup chi tiбәҝt.  
File gб»“m 3 sheets:

| Sheet | Nб»ҷi dung |
|-------|---------|
| Summary | 1 row/run: metrics chГӯnh |
| Configs | CбәҘu hГ¬nh Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§ tб»«ng run |
| Errors | Chб»ү failed runs + error log |

---

## API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | MГҙ tбәЈ |
|--------|----------|--------|
| GET | `/api/models` | Danh sГЎch models (cache theo `runtime.models_cache_ttl_s`) |
| GET | `/api/models/{name}` | Chi tiбәҝt 1 model |
| GET | `/api/gpus` | GPU status tб»« nvidia-smi |
| POST | `/api/heuristic` | TГӯnh VRAM breakdown |
| POST | `/api/sweep` | BбәҜt Д‘бә§u sweep (background) |
| GET | `/api/sweep/{id}` | TrбәЎng thГЎi + kбәҝt quбәЈ sweep |
| GET | `/api/runs` | Lб»Ӣch sб»ӯ benchmark |
| GET | `/api/runs/{id}` | Chi tiбәҝt 1 run |
| DELETE | `/api/runs/{id}` | XГіa 1 run |
| GET | `/api/export` | Download Excel |
| WS | `/ws` | Real-time updates |

Swagger UI: **http://localhost:9100/docs**

---

## PhГўn loбәЎi lб»—i tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng

| Pattern trong Docker log | Error Class |
|--------------------------|-------------|
| `CUDA out of memory` | `OOM` |
| `tensor parallel size.*greater than` | `INVALID_TP` |
| `Segmentation fault` / `SIGSEGV` | `SEGFAULT` |
| `RuntimeError:` / `torch.*Error` | `TORCH_ERROR` |
| `FileNotFoundError` / `model not found` | `MODEL_NOT_FOUND` |
| Timeout (900s default) | `TIMEOUT` |

---

## CбәҘu hГ¬nh Д‘ГЈ kiб»ғm chб»©ng (Production Reference)

| Model | TP | GPU Util | max_num_seqs | VRAM/GPU (weights) |
|-------|----|----------|-------------|---------------------|
| Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-FP8 | 4 | 0.90 | 256 | ~28 GB |
| Qwen3.5-397B-FP8 | 8 | 0.80 | 256 | ~46 GB |

> **397B note**: PhбәЈi dГ№ng `gpu_memory_utilization=0.80` (khГҙng phбәЈi 0.90) do overhead 14GB tб»« 8 processes. Xem `Final_Opti.md` Д‘б»ғ biбәҝt thГӘm chi tiбәҝt.

---

## Troubleshooting

**Backend khГҙng start Д‘Ж°б»Јc:**
```bash
# Kiб»ғm tra port 9100 cГі bб»Ӣ chiбәҝm khГҙng
ss -tlnp | grep 9100
```

**Container khГҙng dб»«ng sau crash:**
```bash
docker ps | grep autotuner
docker stop $(docker ps -q --filter name=autotuner)
```

**Frontend chЖ°a build:**
```bash
cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
```

**Kiб»ғm tra scanner hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng:**
```bash
cd backend
python3 scanner.py
```

**Kiб»ғm tra heuristic vб»ӣi model cб»Ҙ thб»ғ:**
```bash
cd backend
python3 heuristic.py
```
